auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Enter your station credentials
auth.notRequired: Password login is not enabled for this build.
auth.serverNotConfigured: The server has no AUTH_JWT_SECRET. Add it (and run the auth migration) to enable login, or disable NEXT_PUBLIC_REQUIRE_AUTH for local dev.

player.crossfadeTitle: Crossfade (requires both tracks to have audio URLs; disabled while shuffle is on)

recovery.offline: You are offline. Playback will resume when you are back online.
recovery.recovering: Connection issue — trying to resume playback…
recovery.failed: Could not resume playback. Try skipping or playing again.

globalSearch.noMatches: No matching songs or ad breaks

home.subtitle: Pick up where you left off

dashboard.title: Station dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: See what's on air, what's next, and whether spots and library look healthy — built for radio managers.
dashboard.nothingPlaying: Nothing playing — start the queue or pick a track.
dashboard.noBreakScheduled: No upcoming break (check rules or enable one)
dashboard.alertNoSpots: You have no spot rules — scheduled ads won't run.
dashboard.alertEmptyLibrary: Library is empty — add or upload tracks before going live.
dashboard.ganttScaledHint: Queue scaled to fit this timeline

landing.heroSubtitle: Connect every music source you love. Browse, search, and play from Plex, Spotify, Apple Music, and more — all in one premium desktop experience.

multiSource.title: Multi-Source
multiSource.desc: Connect Plex, Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, and more in one player.

unifiedLibrary.title: Unified Library
unifiedLibrary.desc: Browse all your music from every source in a single, beautiful interface.

smartQueue.title: Smart Queue
smartQueue.desc: Seamless queue management across all your connected sources.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Built for speed with instant search, smooth transitions, and zero lag.

landing.sourcesSubtitle: All your music libraries, one unified experience.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start listening across all your sources in seconds.

settings.title: Settings
settings.integrationsMock: Connect is a mock OAuth flow — status is stored locally for UI demos. Apple Music, Spotify, Plex, and YouTube Music are coming soon.
settings.languageHint: Choose English or Thai. Thai is the default for this app.

playback.title: Playback
playback.intro: Crossfade uses your existing player settings. Other options are saved in this browser; full DSP and lossless delivery require future engine work.
playback.autoResumePlaybackHint: When on, playback tries to continue after a network drop or when you reopen the app. Saved in this browser.
playback.songTransitionsHint: Blend the end of one track into the next when both have audio URLs and shuffle is off.
playback.automixSoon: AutoMix-style beat-matched transitions are not available yet.
playback.crossfadeHint: Requires both the current and next tracks to expose a playable URL. Disabled while shuffle is on.
playback.soundCheckHint: Evens out perceived loudness between tracks when implemented in the audio engine.
playback.losslessHint: Preferences are stored locally. Streaming and download codecs are not wired to a real catalog yet.
playback.videoHint: For music videos or visualizers when a video pipeline exists.

sectionDescriptions.station: Station identity — name, slug, timezone, language, brand color.
sectionDescriptions.streams: Encoders, mount points, and the live On Air switch.
sectionDescriptions.integrations: Music sources, cloud upload, and OAuth connections.
sectionDescriptions.imaging: Cart wall defaults and the hotkey legend.
sectionDescriptions.compliance: Royalty reporting and the activity audit log.
sectionDescriptions.audio: Loudness target and the processing chain.
sectionDescriptions.billing: Plans, invoices, and Stripe payment methods.
sectionDescriptions.playback: Crossfade, lossless, and spatial audio preferences.

notFound.title: Settings page not found
notFound.description: We could not find that settings section. Pick another from the left rail.

talent.title: Talent
talent.emptyTitle: User management coming with multi-station rollout
talent.emptyDescription: Hosts, producers, and per-user roles will land alongside the multi-station rollout.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.royaltyDescription: Export ASCAP, BMI, and SoundExchange royalty reports.
compliance.auditDescription: Every change to clocks, schedules, and library is logged.

audio.title: Audio processing
audio.emptyTitle: Audio processing controls coming in Phase 8
audio.emptyDescription: Loudness target, multi-band compression, and limiter controls land in Phase 8.

billing.title: Billing
billing.emptyTitle: Billing integration via Stripe coming in Phase 8
billing.emptyDescription: Plans, invoices, and payment methods will use Stripe Billing in Phase 8.

queue.title: Queue
queue.reorderHint: Drag the grip to reorder. Turn off shuffle to rearrange the queue.
queue.shuffleReorderHint: Shuffle is on — turn it off in the player bar to reorder the queue.
queue.upNextHint: Start times are local · estimated from the current track position
queue.empty: Queue is empty. Add some tracks!

recentlyAdded.title: Recently added
recentlyAdded.intro: Albums in your library, sorted by when they were added. Use search to narrow this list.

tracks.title: Tracks
tracks.intro: Search, filter, and select tracks for your station. Double-click a row to play.
tracks.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, artist, or album…
tracks.emptyFiltered: No tracks match your filters. Try another search or genre.
tracks.emptyLibrary: No tracks in the library yet.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: What do you want to listen to?
search.emptyHint: Search for songs, albums, artists, playlists, or ad-break rules

cart.title: Cart
cart.intro: Assign tracks to instant-play slots for live assist. Keys
cart.introEnd: fire slots 1–9 when focus is not in a text field.
cart.hotkeysGlobal: Hotkeys are global in the app shell.

cartWall.title: Cart wall
cartWall.subtitle: Touch + hotkey board for jingles, sweepers, beds and one-shots.
cartWall.auditionHint: Audition plays slots locally without going on air.
cartWall.hotkeyHint: Press the highlighted key to fire a slot.

emptyState.title: Cart wall is empty
emptyState.description: Drag tracks from the library into a slot, or assign via the track action menu.

broadcast.title: Broadcast
broadcast.intro: Mock encoder + metadata for OBS, Icecast-style tools, or downstream automation. No real stream is created in the browser — connect a real encoder to your mount in production.
broadcast.demoNotice: Demo mode — toggling the switch below does NOT broadcast. Configure NEXT_PUBLIC_ENCODER_URL to wire a real encoder.
broadcast.placeholderHint: Use title, artist, and album as placeholders in the template field above.
broadcast.tip: Tip: pair this with OBS “Text (GDI+)” or a browser dock polling your future `/api/now-playing` endpoint. Today, clipboard + manual wiring is enough to validate your workflow.

automation.title: Automation
automation.intro: Schedule local-time actions for playback. Times use your device clock (24-hour format). Leave all weekdays selected for “every day”, or pick specific days.
automation.runsEveryDay: Runs every day of the week.
automation.noEvents: No events yet. Add a time above.

playlistGenerator.title: Playlist generator
playlistGenerator.intro: Build a rotation-ordered list from your library (by genre bucket), up to a target duration. Load it into the queue to play or preview in the player.
playlistGenerator.breakHint: 0 = off. Inserts a short break track after enough music accumulates.
playlistGenerator.rotationHint: Toggle genres to include. Reorder with arrows (first bucket fires first, then repeats).

cloudUpload.title: Cloud library
cloudUpload.descEmpty: Upload audio from this computer — files are sent to the edge API and appear in your library.
cloudUpload.dropSubtitle: or choose files from your computer

toast.uploadedMany: {{count}} files uploaded to your cloud library

spotSchedule.title: Ad breaks & timing
spotSchedule.intro: Choose when short ads, IDs, or promos play between songs. Times use your computer’s clock. Keep this page open while you’re on air — there is no cloud scheduler in this demo.
spotSchedule.quickTemplatesHint: Add a new rule from a common pattern. You can edit and save after.
spotSchedule.daypartDesc: Limit breaks to part of the day. Leave closed for 24 hours.
spotSchedule.empty: No rules yet. Use a quick template or add a rule to play spots at set times (e.g. :00 and :30).
spotSchedule.minutesHint: Select one or more. Example: :00 and :30 for hourly and mid-hour breaks.
spotSchedule.windowHint: Leave both empty for 24h. Times are local, 24-hour clock.
spotSchedule.noUpcoming: No upcoming times in the next stretch — check minutes, days, or daypart.
spotSchedule.errNoTracks: Select at least one track in the pool.
spotSchedule.errMissingTrack: A track ID is missing from your library.
spotSchedule.disclaimer: Spots enqueue in this browser session only. For 24/7 unattended play you’ll need a backend or playout system.

howToUse.title: How to use
howToUse.intro: Quick reference for Urban Radio: navigation, playback, library, and broadcast-style tools. Data in this demo is local or mock unless you connect cloud uploads or APIs.

sectionNav.title: Navigation & search
items: The sidebar is grouped for stations: Station dashboard, Playback, Music library, Spots & breaks, Tools (automation, cart, broadcast, generator), and Help.
Press ⌘K (Mac) or the search field in the header to open quick search.
Collapse the sidebar with the chevron at the bottom for more room.

sectionPlayer.title: Player & queue
items: The player bar controls play/pause, skip, volume, repeat, shuffle, and optional crossfade when tracks have audio URLs.
Open Queue to reorder or remove items. Cart assigns instant-play slots for live assist (hotkeys when not typing in a field).
Playlist Generator builds a rotation by genre up to a target length, then can load the result into the queue.

sectionLibrary.title: Library
items: Recently added groups albums by when they entered the library (yesterday, this week, this month, earlier). Cloud uploads roll up into a Cloud library album.
Browse Tracks, Albums, Artists, and Playlists from the Library section.
Cloud uploads (if configured) appear alongside mock tracks in the library lists.
Use Search to filter across tracks, albums, and artists.

sectionRadio.title: Automation & broadcast
items: Automation schedules pause/resume at local times on selected weekdays.
Broadcast shows a mock encoder line and metadata template for tools like OBS; there is no real stream in the browser.
Ad breaks & timing inserts chosen spots into the queue on the clock (e.g. :00 and :30). Keep the app open while you need it to run. Use Settings → Appearance for language (English / Thai).

sectionTips.title: Tips
items: Language and theme live under Settings → Appearance.
Spot rules and automation are stored in this browser (local storage).

clocks.title: Hour clocks
clocks.subtitle: Define a 60-minute template once. Drop it on the schedule.
clocks.deleteConfirm: Delete this clock? Scheduled assignments referencing it will be removed.
clocks.canvasEmpty: Drag a slot from the left to start building this hour.

emptyState.title: No clocks yet
emptyState.description: Hour clocks define what plays each hour. Build one, then drop it on the schedule.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Drop hour clocks on the weekly grid. Conflicts surface a resolution dialog.

conflict.title: Overlap detected
conflict.description: A clock is already scheduled for this slot. Choose how to resolve it.

emptyState.title: No schedule assignments
emptyState.description: Drop an hour clock onto a weekday/hour cell to schedule it.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Listening patterns, top tracks, and royalty exports for your station.

geography.title: Geography
geography.comingSoon: Listener geography needs IP capture. Coming once the streaming engine ships.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.comingSoon: Milestones auto-surface peaks once you have 30 days of play data.

royalty.title: Royalty exports
royalty.intro: Download station play data in the columns required by each PRO. Range applies to all exports.
royalty.rowCap: 10,000-row cap per export. Use shorter ranges for high-traffic stations.
royalty.exportCapHit: Row cap exceeded for this range. Narrow the window and try again.

empty.title: No data for this range
empty.description: Try a longer window or wait for play logs to build up.

auditLog.title: Activity log
auditLog.subtitle: Every change to clocks, schedule, voice tracks, broadcasts, royalty exports, and AI usage.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.description: Actions across the app will appear here in chronological order.

voiceTracks.title: Voice tracks
voiceTracks.subtitle: Record voice tracks for breaks. AI-generate or capture from the mic.

recorder.title: Record voice track
recorder.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Grant access in your browser settings.

aiDrawer.title: AI voice track
aiDrawer.capHit: Plan cap reached. Upgrade to enable AI generation.

empty.title: No voice tracks yet
empty.description: Record a voice track or generate one with AI to insert into a break.

liveStudio.title: Live studio
liveStudio.subtitle: On-air controls: now/next/queue, mixer, voice tracking, and health.

mixer.title: Mixer
mixer.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Use the browser address bar to grant access.

quickVT.title: Quick voice track
quickVT.placeholderHeading: Voice track recording lands in Phase 4
quickVT.placeholderBody: This panel will record a voice track that drops into the next break. For now, plan your VTs via the Scheduler.

emptyState.title: Nothing on air
emptyState.description: Start the queue or schedule a clock to bring the studio to life.

tracks.title: No tracks yet
tracks.description: Upload audio or wait for the catalog to sync.

albums.title: No albums yet
albums.description: Albums will appear here as your library grows.

artists.title: No artists yet
artists.description: Artists will appear here as your library grows.

playlists.title: No playlists yet
playlists.description: Create a playlist to organise your library.

search.title: No results
search.description: Try a different keyword or check spelling.

artistNotFound.description: This artist may have been removed or never existed.

albumNotFound.title: Album not found
albumNotFound.description: This album may have been removed or never existed.
